name: Thirty-One 3D Premium
short_description: Thirty-One 3D Premium brings a lot of game variants, challenging opponents and environments with great 3D graphics on your PC.You can play in Singleplayer offline or LAN and Online Mode! The full animated Tutorial explains rules of the popular card game step by step.
detailed_description:
Realistic 3D Thirty-One simulation with singleplayer, multiplayer and tutorial. With configurable AI strength and many adjustable rule and game variants you can start exciting matches - or just play for fun.

Thirty-One is also known as Blitz, Trente-et-un, Cadillac, Whammy, Juble, Schwimmen, Schnauz, Knack and many others.

Compete with tricky computer opponents, or play relaxing rounds with friends or family in online mode!

Game environment, cards, rule variants and much more can be customized! For beginners, there is an animated tutorial in which Thirty-One is explained step-by-step with all the rules.

Features:

  • Singleplayer mode with configurable difficulty
  • Many rule variations of Thirty-One with up to 6 players
  • Multiplayer mode with LAN or Online mode
  • High Quality full animated 3D graphics
  • Lots of tables, rooms and decks
  • High-performance A.I.: different levels of difficulty
  • Voice output and sound
  • Highscore lists
  • HD widescreen output
  • Tutorial, detailed game instructions and help

Note for Linux and Steam Deck users:

To run the game correctly on Linux or Steam Deck, make sure to enable Force Proton in the compatibility settings.
